ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company (e.g., sh603301) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial period (e.g., 201801) */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of financial period (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., USD, %) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric (e.g., ratio, currency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the data belongs to */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period the data belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric the data represents */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the financial data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data (e.g., annual report, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the data belongs to */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period the data belongs to */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., CSV file, API) */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
